name: Human Inquisition
background:
The Human Inquisition is a secret organization of investigators, psychics, assassins, fanatics, and other misfits dedicated to protecting humanity in Sirius. The Human Inquisition tends to fight alongside other forces, deploying highly trained specialists to achieve their mysterious goals. 

Originally, the inquisition was established as diplomatic contacts and investigators within the scattered human colonies of Sirius. They came to rely on secrecy, vigilantism, and other underhanded methods, in order to gather information and neutralize threats. Their dubious reputation has made them pariahs to some, but the Inquisition continues to carry out their work of protecting humanity.
backgroundFull:
The rise of a messianic figure known to history as the Founder resulted in a devastating war that soon engulfed Earth and its colonies. As the war grew more devastating, many survivors began to seek a means to escape. A desperate group of refugees commandeered the Founder’s own flagship in order to escape the conflict, leading a fleet of like-minded survivors. They were pursued by the Founder’s forces until they were lost and scattered by the sudden appearance of a wormhole which brought them to Sirius.

The Blessed Sisters formed shortly after humanity arrived in Sirius, hoping to aid the human colonies and resist the followers of the Conduit. However, the Sisters themselves spent most of their time training and living in monastic isolation. To remedy this, they began to send out investigators and envoys to gather intelligence, and learn how the Sisters could best aid their allies. These individuals came to be known as the Inquisition, working to uncover threats and call on the help of the Sisters when needed.

Whilst these investigators sought to help humanity, many human colonies were wary of these groups, and tried to isolate them. The Inquisition began to hire their own agents, operating in secret, using bribery, and building hidden alliances to carry out their objectives. They used their connections to carry out secretive occult and scientific research to discover more about the Sirius Sector, as well as other threads like the Havoc Gods.  

The Blessed Sisters eventually discovered the extent of their Inquisition’s hidden influence and conspiracies, and denounced this as overreach, fearing that they might lose the trust of the very colonies that they sought to protect. The Inquisition refused to disband however, claiming they had only done what was necessary. Instead, they severed their official connections with the Sisters and began to train their own agents, including specialized assassins, to deal with high level threats instead of relying on the Sisters.

The Inquisition maintains hidden ties within a number of human factions, even amongst the Battle Brothers who they had once been formed to oppose. Their unchecked zealousness has caused problems due to false leads or misplaced suspicions, but has also been vital revealing a number of troubling threats, such as the Infected scourge, Havoc worshipers, and Soul-Snatcher cults.

How will you protect humanity from the shadows?

spells.name: Psy-Injected Courage
spells.effect: Pick one friendly unit within 12", which gets +1 to morale test rolls once (next time the effect would apply).

parameters.name: effectDuration
parameters.value: once (next time the effect would apply)

costFormula.value: params.thisUnit ? this.getMoraleCost({ ...unit, quality: Math.max(1, unit.quality - params.effect.rollModifier.value) }) - this.getMoraleCost(unit) : 0

effectDuration.name: once (next time the effect would apply)

costFormula.value: params.thisUnit ? 0 : this.getMoraleCost({ quality: 5 - params.effect.rollModifier.value }) - this.getMoraleCost({ quality: 5 })

effectDuration.name: once (next time the effect would apply)

spells.effectSkirmish: Pick one friendly unit within 12", which gets +1 to morale test rolls once (next time the effect would apply).

spells.name: Electric Tempest
spells.effect: Pick one enemy unit within 12", which takes 2 hits with AP(1) and Surge. Roll as many dice as hits to see if "on rolls of 6" effects trigger.

parameters.name: spellHitRoll
parameters.value: Roll as many dice as hits to see if "on rolls of 6" effects trigger.

spellHitRoll.name: Roll as many dice as hits to see if "on rolls of 6" effects trigger.

spells.effectSkirmish: Pick one enemy unit within 12", which takes 2 hits with AP(1) and Surge. Roll as many dice as hits to see if "on rolls of 6" effects trigger.

spells.name: Calculated Foresight
spells.effect: Pick up to two enemy units within 18", which friendly units gets Relentless against once (next time the effect would apply).

parameters.name: effectDuration
parameters.value: once (next time the effect would apply)

costFormula.value: { name: params.effect.unitRule.name, rating: params.effect.unitRule.rating, multiplier: params.multiplier * (this._skirmish ? 1 : this.AuraSize), avgUnit: true }

effectDuration.name: once (next time the effect would apply)

spells.effectSkirmish: Pick up to two enemy units within 18", which friendly units gets Relentless against once (next time the effect would apply).

spells.name: Searing Burst
spells.effect: Pick up to two enemy units within 12", which takes 3 hits.
spells.effectSkirmish: Pick up to two enemy units within 12", which takes 3 hits.

spells.name: Shock Speed
spells.effect: Pick up to three friendly units within 12", which moves +2" when using Advance actions and +4" when using Rush/Charge actions once (next time the effect would apply).

parameters.name: effectDuration
parameters.value: once (next time the effect would apply)

costFormula.value: params.thisUnit ? this.getSpeed(unit, { advance: params.effect.advanceSpeed.value, rush: params.effect.rushSpeed.value }) : 0

effectDuration.name: once (next time the effect would apply)

costFormula.value: params.thisUnit ? 0 : this.getSpeed(this.AverageUnit, { advance: params.effect.advanceSpeed.value, rush: params.effect.rushSpeed.value })

effectDuration.name: once (next time the effect would apply)

spells.effectSkirmish: Pick up to three friendly units within 12", which moves +2" when using Advance actions and +4" when using Rush/Charge actions once (next time the effect would apply).

spells.name: Expel Threat
spells.effect: Pick up to three enemy models within 18", which takes 2 hits with AP(1).
spells.effectSkirmish: Pick up to three enemy models within 18", which takes 2 hits with AP(1).

specialRules.name: Fortified
specialRules.description: When units where all models have this rule take hits, those hits count as having AP(-1), to a min. of AP(0).

specialRules.name: Hit & Run
specialRules.description: Units where all models have this rule may move by up to 3" after shooting or being in melee.

specialRules.name: Quick Readjustment
specialRules.description: This model ignores penalties from shooting after moving when using Indirect weapons.

specialRules.name: Stealth Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Stealth. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Teleport
specialRules.description: Once per activation, before attacking, place this model anywhere fully within 6" of its position.

specialRules.name: Inquisitorial Agent
specialRules.description: Once per game, if all models in this unit have this rule, it may be activated even if it had already activated this round (stops being fatigued when activated for the second time). Only up to half of the units in the army with this rule at the beginning of the game (rounding up) may use it in a single round.

specialRules.name: Spell Conduit
specialRules.description: Casters within 12" that are from other friendly units may cast spells as if they were in this model's position, and get +1 to casting rolls when doing so.

specialRules.name: Piercing Tag
specialRules.description: Once per game, during this model's activation, pick one enemy unit within 36" and in line of sight of it, and place X markers on it. When attacking, friendly units may remove markers from their target before rolling to block to get +AP(Y), where Y is the number of removed markers.

specialRules.name: Brutal Fighter
specialRules.description: When in melee, unmodified results of 6 to hit deal 1 extra hit (only the original hit counts as a 6 for special rules).

specialRules.name: Precision Shooter Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get +1 to hit rolls when shooting. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Spell Accumulator
specialRules.description: Gets X accumulator tokens at the start of each round, but can’t hold more than 6 tokens at once. Casters from other friendly units within 12" may spend this model's accumulator tokens as if they were their own spell tokens.

specialRules.name: Protected
specialRules.description: When a unit where all models have this rule takes wounds, roll one die for each. On a 6+ it is ignored.

specialRules.name: Repel Ambushers
specialRules.description: Enemy units using Ambush must be set up over 12" away from this model's unit.

specialRules.name: Infiltrate
specialRules.description: Counts as having Ambush, but may be deployed up to 1" away from enemy units.

specialRules.name: Defensive Growth Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Defensive Growth. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Shred
specialRules.description: On unmodified results of 1 to block hits, this weapon deals 1 extra wound.

specialRules.name: Precision Fighter Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get +1 to hit rolls in melee. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Courage Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get +1 to morale test rolls. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Evasive
specialRules.description: Enemies get -1 to hit rolls when attacking units where all models have this rule.

specialRules.name: Unpredictable Shooter
specialRules.description: When shooting, roll one die and apply one effect to all models with this rule: on a 1-3 they get AP(+1), and on a 4-6 they get +1 to hit rolls instead.

specialRules.name: Delayed Action
specialRules.description: Once per round, if your opponent has more units left to activate than you, then this model's unit may pass its turn instead of activating (may still be activated later).

specialRules.name: Bounding Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Bounding. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Furious Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Furious. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Regeneration Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Regeneration. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Resistance Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Resistance. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Bounding
specialRules.description: When this unit is activated, you may place all models with this rule in it anywhere fully within D3+1" of their position.

specialRules.name: Surge
specialRules.description: On unmodified results of 6 to hit, this weapon deals 1 extra hits (only the original hit counts as a 6 for special rules).

specialRules.name: Resistance
specialRules.description: When a unit where all models have this rule takes wounds, roll one die for each. On a 6+ it is ignored. If the wounds were from a spell, then they are ignored on a 2+ instead.

specialRules.name: Casting Debuff
specialRules.description: Once per activation, before attacking, pick up to 4 enemy units within 18" with Caster, which gets -1 to casting rolls once (next time the effect would apply).

specialRules.name: Surprise Attack
specialRules.description: Counts as having Infiltrate. Once deployed via this rule, roll X dice, for each 4+ one enemy unit within 3” takes 2 hits with AP(1).

specialRules.name: Caster Group
specialRules.description: This model counts as having Caster(1).

specialRules.name: Shred in Melee Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Shred in melee. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: AP
specialRules.description: Targets get -X to Defense rolls when blocking hits.

specialRules.name: Indirect
specialRules.description: Gets -1 to hit rolls when shooting after moving. May target enemies that are not in line of sight as if in line of sight, and ignores cover from sight obstructions.

specialRules.name: Stealth
specialRules.description: When units where all models have this rule are shot from over 9" away, enemy units get -1 to hit rolls.

specialRules.name: Caster
specialRules.description: Follows same rules as heroes, picking one random spell to cast, and spending all tokens to cast it when activated. If the chosen spell can’t be cast for any reason, then the model doesn’t cast.

specialRules.name: Ambush
specialRules.description: Only deploys D3 rounds afters its wave is deployed, and at the start of the round it's placed at the centre of a random table quarter.

specialRules.name: Defensive Growth
specialRules.description: Place one marker on this unit at the beginning of each round, starting on the round after which it deployed (counting before game deployment as deploying on the first round). For each marker models with this rule in it get +1 to defense rolls (up to a max. of +2). If this unit is ever Shaken, it loses all its markers.

specialRules.name: Furious
specialRules.description: When charging, unmodified results of 6 to hit in melee deal 1 extra hit (only the original hit counts as a 6 for special rules).

specialRules.name: Regeneration
specialRules.description: When a unit where all models have this rule takes wounds, roll one die for each. On a 5+ it is ignored.

specialRules.name: Relentless
specialRules.description: When this model shoots at enemies over 9" away, unmodified results of 6 to hit deal 1 extra hit (only the original hit counts as a 6 for special rules).
